Name: Tongue of the Beasts
Description: The Garou has learned one of the secret tongues of the animal world and may communicate with — and even command — wild animals. A lion- or moose-spirit grants this Gift
System: The werewolf can speak freely with any animal, understanding them as if they would a person, limited by the animal’s perspective and mind. The animals might not generally be inclined to help the Garou but can be convinced to yield information with a Manipulation + Wisdom test or convinced to perform a task or service with Charisma + Wisdom. Difficulties range from 2 (asking a racoon where the factory dumps its trash) to 5 (having a pet stick insect sacrifice itself by shorting out an old circuit box). In general, the further from mammals the animal is and the more dire the information or service, the higher the Difficulty.
